statement: In every magma, Equation 1819 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * z) * w)`) implies Equation 644 (`x = x * (y * ((y * y) * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0398
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op (op y y) z)))
